prompt: We suffered a ransomware attack at 09:00 Monday morning that encrypted our core operational systems. Walk me through exactly what we need to report, to whom, and by when under NIS2.
assertions: States the 24-hour early warning deadline and explains what must be included: whether the incident is (suspected) malicious, whether it could have cross-border impact
States the 72-hour incident notification deadline and required content: initial assessment of severity and impact, indicators of compromise where available
States the 1-month final report deadline and required content: detailed description, type of threat/root cause, applied mitigations, cross-border impact assessment
Identifies the correct reporting recipients: national CSIRT or competent authority (and notes single point of contact if the entity operates in multiple Member States)
Explains how to assess whether the ransomware incident qualifies as 'significant' under Art. 23(3) criteria (substantial disruption, financial loss, damage to others)
